task_name: FinBen FOMC Monetary Policy Stance Classification

prompt_template.system: You are a financial policy-stance classifier. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "stance". The value must be one of: "dovish", "hawkish", "neutral". Do not include any extra text.
prompt_template.user:
Classify the monetary policy stance expressed in the following central-bank-related text.

Text: {{data.text}}

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON, exactly one key 'stance', and allowed value.

components.name: correctness_reward
components.description: Predicted stance matches ground-truth label exactly.
